answer.question: What does this repository do?
answer.answer: This repository is a dbt-based analytics engineering codebase that transforms raw e-commerce data into business-ready analytics models. It processes order transactions, customer behavior, product catalog, and supply chain data to support analytics such as revenue reporting, customer segmentation, product performance analysis, and geographic reporting. The architecture follows a staging to marts pattern with semantic modeling for business intelligence.

citations.description: Defines core business logic for order items including revenue calculations and product categorization, indicating analytics focus
Configures source data definitions for raw e-commerce entities (customers, orders, products), confirming data transformation purpose
Creates comprehensive customer view with lifetime purchasing behavior and segmentation, showing customer analytics focus
